title: Nathi Mthethwa to be laid to rest at kwaMbonambi with state funeral
description: NATIONAL NEWS - The KZN government will play...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"NATIONAL NEWS - The KZN government will play a central role in preparations for the funeral of former police minister Nathi Mthethwa, who died in France after falling from the 22nd floor of a Paris hotel.","html":"NATIONAL NEWS - The KZN government will play a central role in preparations for the funeral of former police minister Nathi Mthethwa, who died in France after falling from the 22nd floor of a Paris hotel."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to The Witness, the involvement of the KZN government in Mthethwa’s funeral arrangements followed President Cyril Ramaphosa’s decision to grant the former minister a Category 2 State Funeral.","html":"According to The Witness, the involvement of the KZN government in Mthethwa’s funeral arrangements followed President Cyril Ramaphosa’s decision to grant the former minister a Category 2 State Funeral."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Provincial task team established"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Addressing the media at Mthethwa’s kwaMbonambi home outside Richards Bay in northern KZN, Premier Thami Ntuli confirmed that the provincial government has been tasked with co-ordinating the funeral.","html":"Addressing the media at Mthethwa’s kwaMbonambi home outside Richards Bay in northern KZN, Premier Thami Ntuli confirmed that the provincial government has been tasked with co-ordinating the funeral."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“As a result, there is now a task team composed of the national government, the KZN government and other spheres of government that is now working on the preparations for former minister Mthethwa’s funeral,” he said.","html":"“As a result, there is now a task team composed of the national government, the KZN government and other spheres of government that is now working on the preparations for former minister Mthethwa’s funeral,” he said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ntuli, who led a KZN Cabinet delegation during a visit to Mthethwa’s kwaMbonambi home yesterday, described the former minister as a patriot who dedicated his life to serving the country.","html":"Ntuli, who led a KZN Cabinet delegation during a visit to Mthethwa’s kwaMbonambi home yesterday, described the former minister as a patriot who dedicated his life to serving the country."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“He served our country diligently and with humility. We are happy to report that the president has declared his funeral a state funeral.","html":"“He served our country diligently and with humility. We are happy to report that the president has declared his funeral a state funeral."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“He has made an immense contribution in the lives of the people of this country as he served the government in various portfolios,” he said.","html":"“He has made an immense contribution in the lives of the people of this country as he served the government in various portfolios,” he said."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Long-serving public servant"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At the time of his death, Mthethwa — who had been a member of the national Cabinet for 15 years — was serving as South Africa’s ambassador to France.","html":"At the time of his death, Mthethwa — who had been a member of the national Cabinet for 15 years — was serving as South Africa’s ambassador to France."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ramaphosa described Mthethwa as a dedicated servant of the people.","html":"Ramaphosa described Mthethwa as a dedicated servant of the people."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Ambassador Mthethwa served South Africa with distinction and integrity. From his years in government to his recent diplomatic posting in Paris, he remained a steadfast servant of the people, dedicated to advancing our nation’s interests both at home and abroad,” he said.","html":"“Ambassador Mthethwa served South Africa with distinction and integrity. From his years in government to his recent diplomatic posting in Paris, he remained a steadfast servant of the people, dedicated to advancing our nation’s interests both at home and abroad,” he said."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Funeral set for Sunday"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"While French authorities are yet to release a full report on the cause of Mthethwa’s death, a preliminary probe has concluded that it was likely the former minister took his own life.","html":"While French authorities are yet to release a full report on the cause of Mthethwa’s death, a preliminary probe has concluded that it was likely the former minister took his own life."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ramaphosa confirmed that Mthethwa’s funeral will be held at kwaMbonambi on Sunday.","html":"Ramaphosa confirmed that Mthethwa’s funeral will be held at kwaMbonambi on Sunday."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Article: Caxton Network News","html":"Article: Caxton Network News"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Nathi Mthethwa to be laid to rest at kwaMbonambi with state funeral
